name: 72" Emmond Mid Century Modern Dining Table White/Brown - Threshold™ (Assembly Required)
description:
Boasting a beautiful mix of modern elegance and understated style, the Emmond Mid-Century Modern Dining Table from Threshold™ makes a sleek and stylish foundation in your dining ensemble. With a solid wood frame for lasting use, this dining table features an open base and a rectangular top that's perfect for hosting everything from dinner dates to family meals. Versatile and convenient, simply mix and match with dining chairs of your choice to bring functional style into your home.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
